text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After classes, I spot Satono Diamond run up to
Mejiro McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hic!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Here, take a drink, McQueen. It may help stop
your hiccups!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, thank you. Hopefully, this does the trick.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hic!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It appears that didn't help... Why did this have to
happen when I'm scheduled to give a speech
soon?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Time's quickly running out... But I'm at a loss for
what to do!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: McQueen...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...Um, will you spare me some time before the
party? There's something else I'd like to try!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Oh! Trainer! Can you do me a favor?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Make an announcement across the entire
academy that the roof is currently off limits!
choice_data_list: What are you going to do?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I don't have time to explain right now, sorry. I'm
counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: This appears to be a rather large undertaking...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Feeling pressured, I make the announcement as
requested. Though, I still have no idea what she's
planning...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hic. It's almost time for everybody to gather...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Please wait a little bit longe—oh, here it comes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwup, thwup, thwup, thwup!

text_block_list.name: Medical Staff
text_block_list.text:
HQ! Do you copy? Arriving at Tracen Academy!
Commencing assistance for Satono Diamond's
classmate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: A h-helicopter?! What exactly is going on here?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I called in the Satono Group's private medical
team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whirrr! Whirrr! Whirrr!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This is a mobile intensive care unit, fully equipped
with the latest in medical technology!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't you think this is all a little unnecessary?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Now, in you go! This should be able to stop your
hiccups.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Th-this is preposterous!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Hold on a moment. It seems the shock of
this ridiculous spectacle has rid me of my hiccups.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I guess we showed those hiccups who's
boss!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I do wish you wouldn't startle me like this in
future. But... thank you, Satono.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please don't even mention it! I'm just glad I could
be of help!
choice_data_list: You took decisive action there. Well done!
You took decisive action there. Well done!
The scale of your plan sure was unexpected...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Please don't even mention it! I'm just glad I could
be of help!
choice_data_list: You took decisive action there. Well done!
You took decisive action there. Well done!
The scale of your plan sure was unexpected...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'd go to any lengths for McQueen. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
If you ever need a hand, don't hesitate to ask! I'll
do all I can to help!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Uh, c-certainly... Just please try to keep things
within the realm of common sense next time...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her spirits lifted, Satono Diamond is looking even
more dependable than usual.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I see what you mean. Maybe it would have been
better to deal with this in a more restrained
manner.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! I should have transported McQueen
to a hospital in our private jet instead!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I'm not so sure I'd call that restrained...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond never ceases to surprise me with
her offbeat ideas.
